---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem / motivation**
What are you trying to do that GUA doesn't support well today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Alignment with the project**
Does this fit GUA's principles (open, rule-governed, corrigible, honest)? Does it
touch any immutable rule (R1, R2, R5, R6, R10) or the kill-switch guarantee?

**Alternatives considered**
Anything else you weighed.
